Prediction: No

The current visit record does not provide any explicit evidence of a lipid disorder such as hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other specific lipid metabolism disorder. The diagnoses listed primarily focus on chronic kidney disease, ischemic heart disease, diabetes, and other unrelated conditions. While the patient is on various medications, including those for managing cardiovascular issues, there is no mention of any lipid-specific management or diagnosis. Therefore, based on the information provided, it is not possible to predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be diagnosed in the next hospital visit.
